svg.text: McCzarny recently reported a bug in
microsoft/vscode regarding Agent mode failing
to process prompts. Much of his recent work
centered on the crater-js game, where he
introduced new mobs such as the "Stone Beetle"
and "Worm," complete with sprites, animations,
and AI. He significantly enhanced region
generation by implementing dynamic modifiers
that affect world features and mob spawns.
Character mechanics were refined, including
movement, abilities, and combat involving
falling boulders. UI elements for region
modifiers and character actions also received
updates. Additionally, he contributed to his
chromium-daily-digest project by adding tags to
summaries and fixing overview links. His
personal McCzarny/McCzarny repository saw
updates like adding colors to badges and a
README refresh. Overall, McCzarny has been
actively developing game features and making
contributions across several repositories.
